Years of experience
customCode.css: @property --count { syntax: '<integer>'; initial-value: 0; inherits: false; } :host { display:block; container-type:inline-size; } :host .stats { position:relative; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; max-width:1440px; margin:0 auto; padding:clamp(48px,6vw,88px) clamp(12px,6vw,96px); text-align:center; } :host .stat { min-width:0; opacity:0; filter:blur(14px); transform:translateY(72px); } :host .stat-250, :host .stat-10 { flex:none; width:clamp(33.333%,calc(50% + 810px - 100cqw),50%); } :host .stat-98 { position:absolute; left:33.333%; width:33.333%; max-width:clamp(0px,calc(100cqw - 810px),33.333%); max-height:clamp(0px,calc(100cqw - 810px),200px); overflow:hidden; } :host .value { display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:baseline; font-family:'Helvetica Neue',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(34px,6vw,92px); font-weight:600; line-height:.86; letter-spacing:-.065em; background:linear-gradient(110deg,#b8c9ff 0%,#dc8df1 38%,#f0a3aa 68%,#55d4d1 100%); -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; color:transparent; } :host .count { --count:0; counter-reset:number var(--count); transition:--count 2000ms cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); } :host .count::after { content:counter(number); } :host .stat-250 .count.run { --count:250; transition-delay:350ms; } :host .stat-98 .count.run { --count:98; transition-delay:510ms; } :host .stat-10 .count.run { --count:10; transition-delay:670ms; } :host p { margin:12px 0 0; color:#666; font-family:'Helvetica Neue',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(11px,1vw,17px); font-weight:400; line-height:1.3; letter-spacing:-.015em; } :host .sr-only { position:absolute; width:1px; height:1px; padding:0; margin:-1px; overflow:hidden; clip:rect(0,0,0,0); white-space:nowrap; border:0; }
customCode.note: Avoid broken scoped responsive at-rules. Use container-width units to collapse the satisfaction statistic below 810px and expand the remaining two statistics into one horizontal row.

customCode.html: Lumen Studio
customCode.css: :host { display:block; } :host .blur-title { margin:0; padding:0; font:inherit; color:inherit; line-height:inherit; letter-spacing:inherit; text-align:inherit; text-transform:inherit; text-decoration:inherit; white-space:pre-wrap; } :host .letter { display:inline-block; opacity:0; filter:blur(14px); transform:translateY(.36em); will-change:opacity,filter,transform; } :host .space { white-space:pre; }
customCode.note: Replaces only the Lumen Studio Header rendering with an accessible per-letter load animation: 450ms start delay, 45ms stagger, blur fade, and upward movement.

customCode.css: :host { position: relative; width: 32px; height: 32px; padding: 0; overflow: visible; background: transparent; border: 0; box-shadow: none; } .hamburger { display: flex; width: 22px; height: 16px; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; } .hamburger span { display: block; width: 22px; height: 2px; border-radius: 2px; background: #000000; transition: transform 220ms ease, opacity 220ms ease; } .mobile-menu { position: absolute; z-index: 1000; display: flex; visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); top: 48px; right: 0; width: 200px; padding: 10px; gap: 2px; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 16px; background: #D1D1D1; color: #000000; box-shadow: 0 16px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); transition: opacity 220ms ease, transform 220ms ease, visibility 220ms ease; } .mobile-menu span { display: block; padding: 11px 12px; text-align: left; border-radius: 10px; } :host.open .mobile-menu { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } :host.open .hamburger span:nth-child(1) { transform: translateY(7px) rotate(45deg); } :host.open .hamburger span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; } :host.open .hamburger span:nth-child(3) { transform: translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }
customCode.note: Reduces the expanded phone menu to a compact 200px dropdown aligned beneath the hamburger.

testimonialTop01Quote.name: Quote
testimonialTop01Quote.text: “The way you captured our day is beyond words. Every photo is a treasure.”

testimonialTop02Quote.name: Quote
testimonialTop02Quote.text: “The whole session was fun and effortless. Every final shot was full of energy and character.”

testimonialTop03Quote.name: Quote
testimonialTop03Quote.text: “I arrived nervous, but it quickly became such a relaxed experience. The photos feel completely like me.”

testimonialTop04Quote.name: Quote
testimonialTop04Quote.text: “Every frame feels honest and beautifully considered. We could not be happier with the result.”
